commands.repair_reason: The maintainer label and default-on Codex code-mode-only policy require explicit maintainer review rather than a ClawSweeper repair PR.; Cleared: No concrete dependency, workflow, secret-handling, or supply-chain regression was found; the code-execution surface change is the stated Codex runtime behavior and needs product approval. commands.review_summary:
The PR enables `features.code_mode` and `features.code_mode_only` by default for Codex app-server thread start/resume, updates Codex harness docs/tests/snapshots, adds a changelog note, and refreshes generated Swift gateway protocol fields.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a runtime-default feature PR rather than a bug report. The emitted config is source-verifiable from the diff and the PR body includes terminal/live app-server proof.
commands.review_followup: The `maintainer` label and default-on Codex code-mode-only policy require explicit maintainer review rather than a ClawSweeper repair PR.
